title: David Johnson — yahoo email (contact stub)
html:
TL;DR

  • Single-line Apple Note from April 25, 2023 — title is the name "David Johnson", body is a single yahoo.com email address (REDACTED).
  • No context, no role, no use-case captured — pure address-book overflow into Apple Notes.
  • "David Johnson" is a high-frequency US name; disambiguation is impossible from this note alone. Could be: (a) a returning Brotein-era contact, (b) someone Yahir met in Corvallis / at OSU, (c) a FBLA-orbit person, or (d) totally unrelated.
  • Classic contact-stub failure mode — Yahir captures the email, never adds the why, and 3 years later the note is dead weight.
  • The yahoo.com domain is a soft tell that David Johnson is older / non-tech — yahoo holdouts skew Gen X+. Mild data point.

Privacy redaction

  • The yahoo email (dt1728k@yahoo.com) is redacted in this summary. It's a personal address belonging to a third party with no expressed consent to appear in the graph. Raw note retains it (immutable record).
  • No phone, no other PII present.

Why this exists in the graph

  • Negative-space artifact: documents that Yahir's note-taking flow regularly captures identifiers without identity — the address survives, the relationship doesn't. This is what looks like at its purest.
  • Do not create a david-johnson entity stub — there's no signal to attach. If this name recurs elsewhere with context, promote then.

Connections

  • — contact-stub-without-context subtype
  • brotein — possible orbit (Yahir's spring-2023 active venture)
  • osu · corvallis or — possible context
